history.content:
<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so I cannot move forward safely. To reach the goal at (3,3), I need to go down first. I will turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing down, with a floor cell (2,1) directly ahead. Moving forward is safe and a step toward eventually reaching the goal at (3,3) by going down to row 2, then turning right to cross to (2,3), and finally down to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,1) facing down. The goal is at (3,3). To reach it safely without stepping into lava, I need to go right and then down. I will turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at position (3,2) facing right (`>`). The goal is at (4,4). The cell directly ahead (3,3) is floor, so I can safely move forward. After that, I will need to move further right to (3,4), then turn right to face down and move into the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,2) facing right. The goal is at (3,3). Moving forward to (2,3) is safe (empty cell). From there, I can later turn right and move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2, column 3, facing right (`>`). The goal `G` is directly below me at row 3, column 3. To reach it, I need to face down. Since I am facing right, turning right (clockwise) will orient me down. Then I can move forward into the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am located directly above the goal cell, facing down. Moving forward will place me on the goal cell, completing the task.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
